summary: Impact Driven Mobile Engineer with a strong Android foundation and deep iOS specialization. I leverage domain-driven design and AI-powered workflows to accelerate problem-solving and build scalable, high-performance applications.

experience.description: Gojek is The on-demand arm of GoTo Group, providing an integrated ecosystem for transport, food, and logistics services.
highlights: Implemented the **'Boost on Finding Driver'** intervention to capture **~8% of total priority bookings** and drive **18% feature adoption** by developing a contextual upsell mechanism that allows users to instantly upgrade their booking priority during supply shortages.

Streamlined cross-functional workflows by **centralizing localization** infrastructure across 14 modules. This bridged the gap between the UX Writing (UXW) team and Engineering, **improving reusability, reducing build times and operational bottlenecks**.

**Optimized legacy code** to improve pre-download 3D icons mechanism efficiency, **reducing daily CDN bandwidth from ~55TB to ~25TB**. This directly lowered operational backend costs while maintaining seamless UI performance for the end-user.

Played a critical role by **double-hatting** as a mobile engineer after my first six months to navigate resource discrepancies on a key project, earning a **'Significant Impact'** performance rating before transitioning to a dedicated iOS role.

experience.description: Bareksa is Indonesia's first integrated e-investment platform offering 200+ mutual funds and serving as an official Ministry of Finance partner for Government Securities (SBN).
highlights: Drive, develop, and apply Design System components for all core pages.
Boost AUM (Assets Under Management) & transaction by developing & maintaining Loyalty Program feature.
Drive "Super App Revamp" project to consolidating all new vertical in vital pages (home, portfolio, transaction, help center)
Utilized 3rd party tools to handle promo campaigns (MoEngage) & deeplink-ing (Appsflyer) to simplify our marketing process with low budget & low maintenance effort.

experience.description: Qasir is Cloud-based mobile POS platform helping MSMEs drive growth through digital sales recording, inventory control, and real-time analytics.
highlights: Add observability in the account creation page to track new user pain problems.
Boost revenue from initiating & developing Bundling Package premium features.

projects.title: Laviola - Local Brand Online E-Commerce
projects.description: Since 2022, I have spearheaded the end-to-end development and ongoing maintenance of Laviola, a custom digital ecosystem for an Indonesian apparel distributor that includes an Android app, web dashboard, and backend infrastructure designed to automate complex, role-based pricing structures for distinct customer tiers.

projects.title: Best Concept Champion Hackathon by Sicepat Indonesia - 2022
projects.description: I engineered a route optimization application for last-mile logistics that dynamically generates delivery itineraries based on geospatial proximity, significantly reducing operational costs and fuel consumption while integrating essential features for customer communication and digital proof of delivery.

projects.title: 1st Place Education App Competition by Educational Ministry - 2019
projects.description: I engineered Sibowo, a culturally-focused mobile app designed to re-engage the younger generation with the Javanese language by transforming traditional learning into an immersive experience featuring quizzes, animated content, and gamified vocabulary lists.

skills.items: UIKit, SwiftUI, Coroutines, RxJava, Modular Architecture, MVP, MVVM
Problem Solving, Critical Thinking, System Design, Leadership, Project Management
